```{=html}
<svg class="anim-fig ring-fig" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink" viewBox="0 0 475.856491 229.792982" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" version="1.1">
 <metadata>
  <rdf:RDF xmlns:dc="http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/" xmlns:cc="http://creativecommons.org/ns#" xmlns:rdf="http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#">
   <cc:Work>
    <dc:type rdf:resource="http://purl.org/dc/dcmitype/StillImage"/>
    <dc:date>2026-07-17T19:34:52.819127</dc:date>
    <dc:format>image/svg+xml</dc:format>
    <dc:creator>
     <cc:Agent>
      <dc:title>Matplotlib v3.10.8, https://matplotlib.org/</dc:title>
     </cc:Agent>
    </dc:creator>
   </cc:Work>
  </rdf:RDF>
 </metadata>
 <defs>
  <style type="text/css">*{stroke-linejoin: round; stroke-linecap: butt}</style>
 </defs>
 <g id="figure_1">
  <g id="patch_1">
   <path d="M 0 229.792982 
L 475.856491 229.792982 
L 475.856491 -0 
L 0 -0 
L 0 229.792982 
z
" style="fill: none"/>
  </g>
  <g id="axes_1">
   <g id="patch_2">
    <path d="M 5.696491 218.44 
L 222.696491 218.44 
L 222.696491 1.44 
L 5.696491 1.44 
L 5.696491 218.44 
z
" style="fill: none"/>
   </g>
   <g id="patch_3">
    <path d="M 13.310526 210.825965 
L 203.661404 210.825965 
L 203.661404 20.475088 
L 13.310526 20.475088 
L 13.310526 210.825965 
z
" clip-path="url(#pa219570cef)" style="fill: none; stroke: #33474b; stroke-width: 1.1; stroke-linejoin: miter"/>
   </g>
   <g id="matplotlib.axis_1"/>
   <g id="matplotlib.axis_2"/>
   <g id="wl-q0-0" class="fragment draw-line" data-fragment-index="1">
    <path d="M 108.485965 210.825965 
L 131.335873 192.035964 
L 140.921049 183.866399 
L 147.623707 177.875384 
L 152.792953 172.973645 
L 157.069739 168.616543 
L 160.507086 164.804079 
L 163.397127 161.263934 
L 165.769634 157.996108 
L 167.666593 155.0006 
L 169.139159 152.277412 
L 170.353659 149.554223 
L 171.212586 147.103354 
L 171.838517 144.652484 
L 172.221932 142.201614 
L 172.352586 140.023064 
L 172.280616 137.844513 
L 172.002528 135.665962 
L 171.516023 133.487411 
L 170.820073 131.30886 
L 169.787209 128.857991 
L 168.492231 126.407121 
L 166.939971 123.956251 
L 165.1376 121.505382 
L 162.853285 118.782193 
L 160.288438 116.059005 
L 157.166959 113.063497 
L 153.438857 109.795671 
L 148.724628 105.983207 
L 142.95941 101.626105 
L 134.623552 95.635091 
L 120.19019 85.286974 
L 114.516968 80.929873 
L 109.922558 77.117409 
L 106.330651 73.849583 
L 103.36428 70.854075 
L 100.967605 68.130887 
L 98.878726 65.407698 
L 97.276181 62.956829 
L 95.946429 60.505959 
L 94.998785 58.327408 
L 94.274424 56.148857 
L 93.773931 53.970306 
L 93.495917 51.791756 
L 93.437021 49.613205 
L 93.591931 47.434654 
L 93.953427 45.256103 
L 94.595675 42.805234 
L 95.472248 40.354364 
L 96.698733 37.631175 
L 98.321597 34.635668 
L 100.370008 31.367842 
L 103.04653 27.555378 
L 106.991194 22.38132 
L 108.485965 20.475088 
L 108.485965 20.475088 
" clip-path="url(#pa219570cef)" style="fill: none; stroke: #3b7ea1; stroke-width: 2.4; stroke-linecap: round"/>
   </g>
   <g id="text_1">
    <!-- Q = 0 -->
    <g style="fill: #3b7ea1" transform="translate(160.552623 43.006972) scale(0.13 -0.13)">
     <defs>
      <path id="FiraSans-Light-51" d="M 2893 154 
Q 3258 147 3581 41 
Q 3904 -64 4154 -269 
L 3898 -595 
Q 3552 -288 3181 -173 
Q 2810 -58 2208 -58 
Q 1677 -58 1273 201 
Q 870 461 646 963 
Q 422 1466 422 2182 
Q 422 2893 646 3405 
Q 870 3917 1276 4185 
Q 1683 4454 2208 4454 
Q 2746 4454 3149 4195 
Q 3552 3936 3776 3424 
Q 4000 2912 4000 2189 
Q 4000 557 2893 154 
z
M 826 2182 
Q 826 1229 1200 742 
Q 1574 256 2208 256 
Q 2867 256 3232 739 
Q 3597 1222 3597 2189 
Q 3597 3162 3229 3645 
Q 2861 4128 2208 4128 
Q 1568 4128 1197 3638 
Q 826 3149 826 2182 
z
" transform="scale(0.015625)"/>
      <path id="FiraSans-Light-20" transform="scale(0.015625)"/>
      <path id="FiraSans-Light-3d" d="M 442 2515 
L 442 2842 
L 2714 2842 
L 2714 2515 
L 442 2515 
z
M 442 1395 
L 442 1722 
L 2714 1722 
L 2714 1395 
L 442 1395 
z
" transform="scale(0.015625)"/>
      <path id="FiraSans-Light-30" d="M 1760 4326 
Q 2419 4326 2758 3766 
Q 3098 3206 3098 2125 
Q 3098 1050 2755 490 
Q 2413 -70 1760 -70 
Q 1101 -70 761 490 
Q 422 1050 422 2131 
Q 422 3213 761 3769 
Q 1101 4326 1760 4326 
z
M 1760 4019 
Q 806 4019 806 2131 
Q 806 237 1760 237 
Q 2227 237 2467 697 
Q 2707 1158 2707 2125 
Q 2707 3091 2467 3555 
Q 2227 4019 1760 4019 
z
" transform="scale(0.015625)"/>
     </defs>
     <use xlink:href="#FiraSans-Light-51"/>
     <use xlink:href="#FiraSans-Light-20" transform="translate(68.999985 0)"/>
     <use xlink:href="#FiraSans-Light-3d" transform="translate(96.899979 0)"/>
     <use xlink:href="#FiraSans-Light-20" transform="translate(146.199966 0)"/>
     <use xlink:href="#FiraSans-Light-30" transform="translate(174.09996 0)"/>
    </g>
   </g>
   <g id="text_2">
    <!-- $x(\tau)$ -->
    <g style="fill: #33474b" transform="translate(108.485965 225.482982) scale(0.14 -0.14)">
     <defs>
      <path id="FiraSans-LightItalic-78" d="M 2950 3347 
L 1702 1766 
L 2618 0 
L 2202 0 
L 1446 1542 
L 269 0 
L -173 0 
L 1254 1798 
L 454 3347 
L 864 3347 
L 1504 2010 
L 2515 3347 
L 2950 3347 
z
" transform="scale(0.015625)"/>
      <path id="FiraSans-Light-28" d="M 1728 5203 
Q 1389 4698 1184 4304 
Q 979 3910 854 3404 
Q 730 2899 730 2240 
Q 730 1581 854 1075 
Q 979 570 1184 176 
Q 1389 -218 1728 -723 
L 1491 -877 
Q 1094 -320 867 77 
Q 640 474 493 1005 
Q 346 1536 346 2240 
Q 346 2944 493 3475 
Q 640 4006 867 4403 
Q 1094 4800 1491 5357 
L 1728 5203 
z
" transform="scale(0.015625)"/>
      <path id="FiraSans-LightItalic-3c4" d="M 1395 781 
Q 1382 640 1382 602 
Q 1382 448 1436 368 
Q 1491 288 1626 230 
L 1485 -51 
Q 1229 32 1120 176 
Q 1011 320 1011 570 
Q 1011 627 1024 781 
L 1338 3034 
L 826 3034 
Q 582 3034 454 3021 
Q 326 3008 192 2963 
L 141 3264 
Q 262 3309 435 3328 
Q 608 3347 883 3347 
L 2963 3347 
L 2912 3034 
L 1709 3034 
L 1395 781 
z
" transform="scale(0.015625)"/>
      <path id="FiraSans-Light-29" d="M 582 5357 
Q 979 4800 1206 4403 
Q 1434 4006 1581 3475 
Q 1728 2944 1728 2240 
Q 1728 1536 1581 1005 
Q 1434 474 1206 77 
Q 979 -320 582 -877 
L 346 -723 
Q 685 -218 889 176 
Q 1094 570 1219 1075 
Q 1344 1581 1344 2240 
Q 1344 2899 1219 3404 
Q 1094 3910 889 4304 
Q 685 4698 346 5203 
L 582 5357 
z
" transform="scale(0.015625)"/>
     </defs>
     <use xlink:href="#FiraSans-LightItalic-78" transform="translate(0 0.296875)"/>
     <use xlink:href="#FiraSans-Light-28" transform="translate(45.699997 0.296875)"/>
     <use xlink:href="#FiraSans-LightItalic-3c4" transform="translate(78.099991 0.296875)"/>
     <use xlink:href="#FiraSans-Light-29" transform="translate(121.499985 0.296875)"/>
    </g>
   </g>
   <g id="text_3">
    <!-- $\tau$ -->
    <g style="fill: #33474b" transform="translate(1.44 112.780526) scale(0.14 -0.14)">
     <use xlink:href="#FiraSans-LightItalic-3c4" transform="translate(0 0.703125)"/>
    </g>
   </g>
  </g>
  <g id="axes_2">
   <g id="patch_4">
    <path d="M 257.416491 218.44 
L 474.416491 218.44 
L 474.416491 1.44 
L 257.416491 1.44 
L 257.416491 218.44 
z
" style="fill: none"/>
   </g>
   <g id="patch_5">
    <path d="M 265.030526 210.825965 
L 455.381404 210.825965 
L 455.381404 20.475088 
L 265.030526 20.475088 
L 265.030526 210.825965 
z
" clip-path="url(#p3788f431f7)" style="fill: none; stroke: #33474b; stroke-width: 1.1; stroke-linejoin: miter"/>
   </g>
   <g id="matplotlib.axis_3"/>
   <g id="matplotlib.axis_4"/>
   <g id="wl-p1-0" class="fragment draw-line" data-fragment-index="2">
    <path d="M 360.205965 210.825965 
L 383.388716 197.482341 
L 395.243178 190.402051 
L 404.859795 184.411036 
L 413.19107 178.964659 
L 420.305772 174.06292 
L 426.661054 169.433499 
L 432.642162 164.804079 
L 437.918402 160.446977 
L 442.84797 156.089876 
L 447.432746 151.732774 
L 451.680536 147.375673 
L 455.368717 143.29089 
L 455.368717 143.29089 
" clip-path="url(#p3788f431f7)" style="fill: none; stroke: #9c162a; stroke-width: 2.4; stroke-linecap: round"/>
   </g>
   <g id="wl-p1-1" class="fragment draw-line draw-seq2" data-fragment-index="2">
    <path d="M 265.253963 143.018571 
L 268.873646 138.661469 
L 272.21249 134.304368 
L 275.483868 129.674947 
L 278.679587 124.773208 
L 281.96724 119.326831 
L 285.64803 112.791178 
L 291.777687 101.353787 
L 296.853254 92.094946 
L 300.693771 85.559293 
L 304.31648 79.840597 
L 307.849311 74.666539 
L 311.652502 69.492481 
L 315.742595 64.318423 
L 320.125597 59.144365 
L 324.796988 53.970306 
L 330.009484 48.523929 
L 336.058946 42.532915 
L 343.269021 35.724943 
L 352.563119 27.283059 
L 360.205965 20.475088 
L 360.205965 20.475088 
" clip-path="url(#p3788f431f7)" style="fill: none; stroke: #9c162a; stroke-width: 2.4; stroke-linecap: round"/>
   </g>
   <g id="text_4">
    <!-- Q = +1 -->
    <g style="fill: #9c162a" transform="translate(407.645436 43.006972) scale(0.13 -0.13)">
     <defs>
      <path id="FiraSans-Light-2b" d="M 1754 3251 
L 1754 2278 
L 2714 2278 
L 2714 1958 
L 1754 1958 
L 1754 986 
L 1402 986 
L 1402 1958 
L 442 1958 
L 442 2278 
L 1402 2278 
L 1402 3251 
L 1754 3251 
z
" transform="scale(0.015625)"/>
      <path id="FiraSans-Light-31" d="M 1869 4256 
L 1869 0 
L 1498 0 
L 1498 3846 
L 448 3194 
L 275 3469 
L 1549 4256 
L 1869 4256 
z
" transform="scale(0.015625)"/>
     </defs>
     <use xlink:href="#FiraSans-Light-51"/>
     <use xlink:href="#FiraSans-Light-20" transform="translate(68.999985 0)"/>
     <use xlink:href="#FiraSans-Light-3d" transform="translate(96.899979 0)"/>
     <use xlink:href="#FiraSans-Light-20" transform="translate(146.199966 0)"/>
     <use xlink:href="#FiraSans-Light-2b" transform="translate(174.09996 0)"/>
     <use xlink:href="#FiraSans-Light-31" transform="translate(223.399948 0)"/>
    </g>
   </g>
   <g id="text_5">
    <!-- $x(\tau)$ -->
    <g style="fill: #33474b" transform="translate(360.205965 225.482982) scale(0.14 -0.14)">
     <use xlink:href="#FiraSans-LightItalic-78" transform="translate(0 0.296875)"/>
     <use xlink:href="#FiraSans-Light-28" transform="translate(45.699997 0.296875)"/>
     <use xlink:href="#FiraSans-LightItalic-3c4" transform="translate(78.099991 0.296875)"/>
     <use xlink:href="#FiraSans-Light-29" transform="translate(121.499985 0.296875)"/>
    </g>
   </g>
   <g id="text_6">
    <!-- $\tau$ -->
    <g style="fill: #33474b" transform="translate(253.16 112.780526) scale(0.14 -0.14)">
     <use xlink:href="#FiraSans-LightItalic-3c4" transform="translate(0 0.703125)"/>
    </g>
   </g>
  </g>
 </g>
 <defs>
  <clipPath id="pa219570cef">
   <rect x="5.696491" y="1.44" width="217" height="217"/>
  </clipPath>
  <clipPath id="p3788f431f7">
   <rect x="257.416491" y="1.44" width="217" height="217"/>
  </clipPath>
 </defs>
</svg>
```
